card.budget: TBD (Joan to brief; benchmark vs Singapore expected lower)
card.situation: H1 positioning = WorldFirst as the main payment option to China. Mass-market T3/T4 focus, geographic concentration in KL, Selangor, Johor, Penang, Perak. Multi-ethnic market: Malays trust Malay KOLs strongly; Chinese community is its own track (Malaysian-Chinese specifically, not mainland Chinese in Malaysia, for business reasons since mainland Chinese register on WF's Chinese platforms). KOL model is mixed-language, mixed-ethnicity. Pre-July = offshore (KOLs only, no acquisition CTA on brand channels, no affiliate tracking). Post-July = onshore, affiliate links and acquisition tracking turn on. Three audience cuts under discussion: 1688 buyers (broad), payment-to-China importers (B2B, hard via social), e-commerce coaches (niche, high LTV). Steven validated Joan's pivot away from 1688-only messaging (1688 platform adding payment options + hiding pricing = WF acquisition deepening).
asks: Pull Malaysian Chinese community research via Chinese agency network (WeChat / Xiaohongshu / Mandarin YouTube + IG creators in MY) — Joan specifically asked
Review Joan's KOL brief (forthcoming) and feed back
Provide Joan budget benchmark input vs other regions
Brief Emily / TikTok SEA: any Malaysia KOL deal must send Collab Invite to TikTok SEA account for boosting
next: Joan drafts brief with Web TV Asia (agency, has MY office, previously used for Korea)
Steven supplies Chinese-community research + budget benchmark
July: brand channel goes onshore in MY, acquisition tracking enabled
benchmarks: Malaysia is not price-sensitive unless user is primed; convenience > price for most segments
Big Chinese-community KOL (~100K+ followers) acceptable target given Alipay trust card; for Malay/Indian segments, micro-influencer mix preferred
Sourcing also expanding beyond China within SEA (Joan to test in client visits next week)

audienceSegments.track: ethnically-matched Malay KOLs essential, trust within community is strong

audienceSegments.track: low priority — registers on WF China platforms not international

phasing.postJuly: Onshore — affiliate links + acquisition tracking enabled
